meta.title: Eddy
meta.description: Eddy removes the anxiety from swimming.

hero.subA: Swimming, without the fear. The gentle swim app for anxious beginners. Calm design and biomedical insight to take you from panic to peace.
hero.subB: Find your flow. The gentle swim app for anxious beginners. Calm design and biomedical insight to take you from panic to peace.
hero.proof: Be one of the first to swim with Eddy.
hero.trust: Built on biomedical insight · London, UK
hero.done: You're on the list — welcome to the calm.
hero.error: Something went wrong — please try again.

pillars.heading: Four feelings, one gentle push.
pillars.intro: Every part of Eddy is shaped around the emotional journey of learning to swim as an adult — from the fear that holds you back to the joy that keeps you going.

items.title: Anxiety
items.copy: We acknowledge your fears first, and then design a plan to overcome it.

items.title: Support
items.copy: Coaching and community so that you never feel alone in your lane.

items.title: Progress
items.copy: Small, trackable steps and achievements that quietly build into confidence.

items.title: Joy
items.copy: The goal was to be confident, but you come away wanting to swim more.

method.heading: Calm by design. Backed by science.
method.intro: Eddy was built by a biomedical engineer who understands the mechanics of water. The belief behind Eddy is simple: swimming should feel like freedom, not fear.

steps.title: Calm by design
steps.copy: Deep-water colours, soft edges, and an unhurried pace. Every screen is shaped to lower your heart rate, not raise it.

steps.title: Biomedical insight
steps.copy: Sessions grounded in over a decade of National level experience and biomechanics, so each step is gentle, kind to your body, and grounded in understanding.

steps.title: Gentle AI guidance
steps.copy: Your attentive companion, Eddy, who will adapt to how you feel each day, nudging you forward only as fast as you're ready.

quotes.q: The sessions produced by the swim plan generator have been brilliant in giving me the confidence to learn to swim for my half-Ironman next year.
If you would like to be part of the team who tests the initial versions of the app, sign-up and reach out to us today!

waitlist.heading: Your first calm swim is closer than you think.
waitlist.copy: Join the waitlist and help me build the swim app you wish had existed when you first stood nervously at the water's edge.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.brandDesc: The intelligent swim app for anxious beginners. Find your flow, one gentle swim at a time.
